mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave (user_id, leavetype_id, approval_status_id, start_date, end_date, approved_at, approved_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{leaveTypeId}, #{approvalStatusId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{approvedAt}, #{approvedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE leave SET user_id = #{userId}, leavetype_id = #{leavetypeId}, approval_status_id = #{approvalStatusId}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, approved_by = #{approvedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
